name: Challenger Gold Limited
analysis: CEL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1350, stop A$0.1188, target A$0.1525 (1.08:1) — then trail it.
